title: hieracium mollitum var. enginense
intro: Hieracium mollitum var. enginense, also known as Engin Hawkweed, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Hieracium mollitum plant, a member of the dandelion family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, promote wound healing, and support overall health and well-being. In herbal preparations, Hieracium mollitum var. enginense is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to support the body's natural healing processes.
